The '''[[Sith academy]] of [[Gentes/Legends|Gentes]]''' was established by the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]], and was active near the end of the [[New Sith Wars]]. The Sith used the academy to [[Sith training|train]] [[Sith Warrior]]s and [[Sith Marauder|Marauders]]. Here these warriors would learn to focus their emotions into a raging battle fury and become impressive forces of destruction. [[Sith sorcerer|Sorcerers]] of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] would mold these warriors into ravenous beasts, used for the sole purpose of destroying enemies of the Brotherhood of Darkness.
